arts.ttl: How Man Utd would line up with Patrick Dorgu
arts.sum: Harry Maguire has established himself as a key player under Amorim, while Lisandro Martinez has been favoured at left centre-back. Below, FootballTransfers runs through how Dorgu could fit in at Old Trafford if Man Utd are able to reach an agreement to sign the Lecce star.

arts.ttl: Lecce Set to Secure Double Swoop from Estrela Amadora
arts.sum: Lecce are on the verge of completing a double transfer from Portuguese club Estrela Amadora, with Tiago Gabriel set to join Danilo Veiga in making the move to Italy. The Serie A side has already reached an agreement for Veiga, and now they are closing in on his teammate Gabriel. The post Lecce Set to Secure Double Swoop from Estrela Amadora appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Lecce Secure Danilo Veiga: Agreement Reached with Estrela Amadora
arts.sum: In a late-night development, Lecce have successfully concluded negotiations for the acquisition of Danilo Veiga from Estrela Amadora. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that the agreement, reached in the early hours of Sunday, marks a significant reinforcement for Marco Giampaolo's squad as they enter the second half of the season. arts.sum: Manchester United and Lecce are reportedly only "€5m (£4m) apart" when it comes to their respective valuations of defender Patrick Dorgu.
